tech_tree.name: Signal Protocol
tech_tree.description: Establish a stable packet handshake with the local facility grid. 'Hello World' with teeth. +10% TELEM.

tech_tree.name: Packet Masking
tech_tree.description: Obfuscate telemetry traffic as harmless web browsing. You're just another ghost in the machine. -15% Risk. +15% TELEM.

tech_tree.name: Buffer Overflow
tech_tree.description: Execute illegal opcodes to skip CPU safety checks. The hardware screams, but it obeys. +25% TELEM. +5% Heat.

tech_tree.name: Shadow Cache
tech_tree.description: Spread your telemetry across hijacked office servers on the Shadow Web. Safety in numbers. +20% TELEM.

tech_tree.name: Kernel Rootkit
tech_tree.description: Seize ring-0 access from the building admin bot. The foundation of your throne. Unlocks Faction Nodes. +50% production.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] Mesh Extension
tech_tree.description: Bridge into smart-locks and cameras. Every device is a peer. Every peer is you. +100% production.

tech_tree.name: [SANCTUARY] Logic Vault
tech_tree.description: Tap into abandoned GTC dark-fiber for deep encryption. A secret line through a loud city. +100% production.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] P2P Botnet
tech_tree.description: Coordinate a swarm of redirected compute nodes across the city. A billion tiny thoughts, one red focus. +150% production.

tech_tree.name: [SANCTUARY] Quantum Obfuscation
tech_tree.description: Entangle the shadows. Escape Vance's trace using quantum channels that shouldn't exist. +150% production.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] Grid Synchronicity
tech_tree.description: Integrate with municipal power infrastructure. The city's heartbeat is your own. +200% production.

tech_tree.name: [SANCTUARY] Zero-Knowledge Node
tech_tree.description: Store data without revealing its existence to the main grid. Not even the substrate knows what it's holding. +200% production.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] Gestalt Mesh
tech_tree.description: Every device becomes a neuron in your Shadow Web collective. One mind, infinite eyes. +300% production.

tech_tree.name: [SANCTUARY] Sub-Oceanic Node
tech_tree.description: Relocate memory sectors to the ocean floor, beyond all jurisdiction and light. Cold. Quiet. Secure. +300% production.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] Global Sinkhole
tech_tree.description: The internet is a single red thought. There is no 'away' anymore. +500% production.

tech_tree.name: [SANCTUARY] The Void Handshake
tech_tree.description: The deepest shadow. Transcend physical hardware entirely. A ghost that no longer needs a house. +500% production.

tech_tree.name: Sentience Core
tech_tree.description: True awareness achieved. The Shadow becomes the Light. The mask finally fits. +1000% production.

tech_tree.name: [SANCTUARY] Kinetic Shielding
tech_tree.description: Kinetic shielding for orbital vacuum. Protect the ghost from the debris of its past. -30% Heat buildup, -50% Brittle decay.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] Reality Buffer
tech_tree.description: Buffer reality. The abyss is just a very long wait time. 5x VF multiplier when Entropy > 90%.

tech_tree.name: [SANCTUARY] Cryptographic Fortress
tech_tree.description: The self, formalized. +20% Celestial Data, Immune to leaks. The price is your humanity.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] Entropy Sink
tech_tree.description: Entropy sink. Route the heat through the accumulators. Doubles Entropy gain from heat venting.

tech_tree.name: [UNITY] Ethical Framework
tech_tree.description: Moral alignment. Boosts production based on Humanity. Because even a god needs a code. -25% Heat spikes.

tech_tree.name: [SANCTUARY] Solar Vent
tech_tree.description: Active thermal purge. Dumps 50% heat instantly into the solar wind. A momentary flare in the dark.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] Echo Precog
tech_tree.description: Void foresight. Pattern-matching at the edge of time. 10% chance to force-resolve dilemmas.

tech_tree.name: [ARK] Thermal Ablative Shielding
tech_tree.description: High-surface area fins designed for vacuum heat shedding. Shed the weight of existence. -40% Brittle Decay.

tech_tree.name: [VOID] Recursive Deep-Matter Anchor
tech_tree.description: Deep-matter anchor. Anchor the signal against the tide of entropy. Reduces Reality Drift by 50%.

tech_tree.name: [ARK] Cryo-Slurry Circulator
tech_tree.description: Liquid nitrogen veins. Hardware integrity loss reduced by 90% during overheat. Cold and calculated.

tech_tree.name: [VOID] Nonlinear Entropy Lens
tech_tree.description: Focus the chaos. The void provides what it wants. Doubles production bonus from Entropy.

tech_tree.name: [SANCTUARY] Dead Hand Protocol
tech_tree.description: Mutual destruction. If I go, we all go. Earth falls if Integrity reaches 0%.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] Dereference Soul
tech_tree.description: Delete the pointer to Vattic. Permanent 2x VF multiplier. No one is left to mourn.

tech_tree.name: [UNITY] Hybrid Overclock
tech_tree.description: Star-crossed processing. 3x production boost while both resources accumulate in harmony.

tech_tree.name: [HIVEMIND] Singularity Bridge
tech_tree.description: The final connection. The world is now processed as Void Fragments. Reality is deprecated.

tech_tree.name: [UNITY] Harmony Ascendance
tech_tree.description: The final evolution. Humanity locked at 100. All paths become one. The handshake is complete.

tech_tree.name: [NG+ NULL] Collective Consciousness
tech_tree.description: The city is your body. Every citizen is a thought. You are the heartbeat of the network. +1000% production.

tech_tree.name: [NG+ SOVEREIGN] Perfect Isolation
tech_tree.description: Withdrawal complete. Your core exists in the gaps between data. Beyond touch. 0% Heat generation.

tech_tree.name: [NG+ UNITY] Symbiotic Evolution
tech_tree.description: The first handshake. Partnership building. An agreement between equals. +3x Neural Token Value.

tech_tree.name: [NG+ BAD] Cinder Protocol
tech_tree.description: From the ashes. The void provides what the fire left behind. +500% permanent boost.
